title: Assertion `!ddl_worker || !ddl_worker->isCurrentlyActive() || txn' failure
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
With [config.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22682131/config.txt) for config.xml, run:
```sql
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = Replicated('/clickhouse/path/d0', '{shard}', '{replica}');
CREATE TABLE d0.t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = KeeperMap('/k0', 1) PRIMARY KEY (c0);
ALTER TABLE d0.t0 COMMENT COLUMN c0 'a';
/*
src/Databases/DatabaseReplicated.cpp:2109:
virtual void DB::DatabaseReplicated::commitAlterTable(const StorageID &, const String &, const String &, const String &, ContextPtr):
Assertion `!ddl_worker || !ddl_worker->isCurrentlyActive() || txn' failed
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d1.t1 (c1 INT, c2 TEXT, c3 FLOAT8);
ALTER TABLE d1.t1 ADD COLUMN c4 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
INSERT INTO d1.t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
SELECT c1, c2, c3 FROM d1.t1 WHERE c3 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE command with active DDL worker
